name: Tyge William Cellars
seoDescription: Tyge William Cellars — a boutique Sonoma winery on the Plaza, with bold, small-production Cabernet, Pinot Noir and Sauvignon Blanc crafted by Wine-of-the-Year winemaker Don Van Staaveren.

hero.heading: Crafted by the winemaker behind a Wine of the Year
hero.subheading: A small boutique Sonoma winery led by winemaker Don Van Staaveren, whose 1996 Chateau St. Jean Cinq Cépages was named Wine Spectator's Wine of the Year.

images.heroAlt: Tyge William Cellars in Sonoma, CA

about.heading: Our Story
body: Founded in 2009 and named for founder Darius Anderson's firstborn son, Tyge William, the winery was born from a tenacious, adventurous spirit — and imbues every bottle with a ruggedly individual approach rooted in small-scale production and small vineyard parcels.

The wines are crafted by award-winning winemaker Don Van Staaveren, a Sonoma County veteran whose 1996 Chateau St. Jean Cinq Cépages was named Wine Spectator's Wine of the Year, bringing international attention to the region. He brings that same old-world intricacy to Tyge William's bold, flavorful wines.

From a Sauvignon Blanc sourced from a special Yountville vineyard to a flagship Cabernet Sauvignon grown on the hillside home vineyard just outside the township of Sonoma, every wine is built to be memorable. The tasting room sits right on the Sonoma Plaza at 144 West Napa Street.

services.title: Sonoma Plaza Tasting Room
services.description: Taste through the Tyge William lineup at the tasting room on the historic Sonoma Plaza, at 144 West Napa Street.

services.title: Estate & Sourced Wines
services.description: A boutique portfolio including Cabernet Sauvignon, Pinot Noir, Chardonnay and Sauvignon Blanc, crafted with old-world intricacy.

services.title: Club Tyge
services.description: A wine club built in the spirit of adventure — pairing great wine with good people, dining, and exploration.
